title: taraxacum delanghii
intro: Taraxacum delanghii, also known as the New Zealand dandelion or prickly dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys. The health benefits associated with Taraxacum delanghii include its potential to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum delanghii is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
